description.value: Price 10,000 gp DESCRIPTION When animated, an ebony fly is the size of a pony and has all the statistics of a pegasus but can make no attacks. The item can be used three times per week for up to 12 hours per use. When 12 hours have passed or when the command word is spoken, the ebony fly again becomes a tiny statuette. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 5,000 gp
